primary_text:
Industry data says the average supermarket beef travels 2,400km before it reaches your kitchen. It sits in cold storage for up to three weeks.

FarmThru beef comes from named regenerative farms across NSW. It goes from the farm to our Brookvale hub within days.

No hormones. No feedlots. No middlemen adding time and kilometres.

100% grass-fed. Pasture-raised. You can trace every cut back to the paddock it came from.

Order what you want, when you want. No subscription, no lock-in.
headline: 2,400km and three weeks in cold storage
description: Industry average for supermarket beef. FarmThru beef: farm to hub in days, not weeks.
creative_brief: Split screen. Left: long highway with refrigerated truck, blue-grey tint. Right: green NSW paddock with cattle. Clean stat overlay on each side.
